rulings.Case Title: RICHARD BARRON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Defendant Tosco Corporation'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Monday, May 16, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel the depositions of defendant Tosco Corp.¿s person most knowledgeable and custodian of records and request for production of documents is denied. The cut-off date to hear discovery motions has passed, and plaintiff did not file a motion to re-open discovery, so the court cannot grant this motion. (Pelton-Shepherd Industries, Inc. v. Delta Packaging Products, Inc. (2008) 165 Cal. App. 4th 1568, 1585-88). Defendant¿s request for sanctions is granted. Plaintiff and his counsel to pay $1800 (6 hours at $300 per hour) due to plaintiff¿s failure to engage in any meaningful meet and confer effort prior to filing the motion. = (220/HEK)
